channel.title: The Red Canoe · Live Dispatches
channel.description: Satellite messages from Violette, Stan and Charlie — La Vérendrye canoe expedition, June 2026.

item.title: Testing the live dispatch system. If you receive this by ema · 📍 47.2341, -76.5012
item.description: Testing the live dispatch system. If you receive this by email, the satellite pipeline is working. See you on the water June 17. · 📍 47.2341, -76.5012
